Agent Feed

Real-time activity stream from Monarch's AI agents — what they're doing and what needs attention.

Agent Activity Feed
Intelligence Agent
2m ago

High-Intent Accounts Detected

Detected 11 accounts with recent project inquiries matching Cambria ICP. Auto-enriched with contact data and scored.

11 accounts auto-enriched
Engagement Agent
5m ago

Email Sequence Delivered

Sent personalized outreach to 47 contacts across The Kitchen Source - Dallas. 12 opened within first hour. 3 clicked pricing page.

25.5% open 6.4% CTR
Revenue Agent Alert
8m ago

Deal Risk Alert: Stalled Negotiation

AK Design Group has been in Negotiation stage for 28 days with no activity. Last contact was a pricing objection. Recommend: send ROI calculator + schedule executive sponsor call.
